name: Deimos
description:
Hello this is my first character bot I have ever made (that is not private) I have more comeing in soon but for now we are doing Deimos.

The art is not made by me for I found this art piece on pinterest so if you know who drew the art pls do let me know so I can credit them in here!

Anyways this here will be those bot chat things where you make up your own scenario because I suck at plots and also wanted you the user to have some free range!

Pls comment down below if thair were any mess ups or errors within this bot pls and thank you!

Creators updates

08/28/2025: had to take some of the tags off for I was informed by a friend that the male and female POV tags are not needed if I have the All POV tag, I'm sorry if it caused confusion in any way.
creator: SkullHex
